chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-857 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.6982/2025 3. For hearing of CMA No.25855/2024 4. For orders as to maintainability of petition against respondent No.2 18.11.2025 Petitioner present in person Respondent No.1 Mr. Ali Azad Saleem, advocate --------- Through the instant petition, the petitioner has sought indulgence of the Court to issue directions to the learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge Malir Karachi for initiation of the contempt of Court proceedings against the respondents Ali Azad Saleem and Rizwan Cooperative Housing Society Ltd. for violating the Court order dated 04.02.2019. The petitioner who is present in person was put on notice to satisfy the Court as to how the contempt of Court proceedings can be initiated against a counsel who assists the Court but he failed. The contempt petition to that extent being misconceived, meritless and without any cause is dismissed. The petitioner is warned in case in future if he initiates any proceedings against a counsel who is appearing for the opposite side, he shall be dealt with strictly with heavy cost which shall be imposed upon him. Adverting to the issue of initiation of the contempt of Court proceedings against Rizwan Cooperative Housing Society Ltd. for violation of the order dated 04.02.2019 for which the application has been preferred before the concerned Court. The learned trial Court shall look into the merits of the contempt application to see as to whether the order dated 04.02.2019 has been violated to initiate contempt proceedings.

Adverting to the issue of initiation of the contempt of Court proceedings against Rizwan Cooperative Housing Society Ltd. for violation of the order dated 04.02.2019 for which the application has been preferred before the concerned Court. The learned trial Court shall look into the merits of the contempt application to see as to whether the order dated 04.02.2019 has been violated to initiate contempt proceedings. From the impugned order it transpires that certain directions as to the execution proceedings were issued and proceedings were made subject to disposal of the Civil Appeal No.83/2018 and Criminal Revision No.16/2018. The respondent No.1 has placed on record copies of the judgments passed in above referred proceedings and it transpires from the record that said proceedings have been culminated and were no more pending before the Court seized with the matter. Since the petitioner has filed application before the concerned Court, it was duty of the Court to decide applications through appropriate orders. P a g e | 2 This petition is disposed of with directions to the Court of learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge Malir Karachi, to deal with the contempt application filed by the petitioner and decide the same within a period of 30 days from the date of this order. Office to send copy of this order to the concerned trial Court for compliance. JUDGE Nadir*
